tdd_cycle.red: Added 7 failing test cases for formatMessageTimestamp (basic ja/enUS/no-locale formatting, locale-difference sanity, Invalid Date guard, non-Date guard, and PPp output consistency).
tdd_cycle.green: Implemented formatMessageTimestamp(timestamp, locale?) in src/lib/date-utils.ts using date-fns format(date, 'PPp', { locale }) with Invalid Date / non-Date defensive fallback returning empty string.
tdd_cycle.refactor: Replaced the two toLocaleTimeString() useMemo blocks in ConversationPairCard.tsx (UserMessageSection / AssistantMessageItem) with the new helper plus useLocale + getDateFnsLocale, matching MessageList.tsx / PromptMessage.tsx.

summary: Issue #687: Added formatMessageTimestamp() in src/lib/date-utils.ts (date-fns 'PPp' with Invalid Date guard) and switched ConversationPairCard's UserMessageSection/AssistantMessageItem from toLocaleTimeString() to the new helper via useLocale/getDateFnsLocale. 7 new unit tests pass. All 36 ConversationPairCard regression tests pass. Full unit suite: 6406 passed / 7 skipped. tsc --noEmit and npm run lint both clean.
